headline: Eni Expands Energy Storage Ambitions Through Partnership With FIB
summary: E and FIB teams up to build lithium iron phosphate batteries in Italy, from cells to storage systems, with plans to add recycling later.

headline: Oil Stocks Look Poised for Another Leg Higher
summary: Peace talks between the US and Iran have again collapsed and oil stocks look ready to rally again. Marathon Petroleum, Valero Energy and Phillips 66 all boast top Zacks Ranks and strong price momentum.

headline: Valero Energy Is A 'Buy' As Refining Tailwinds Still Have Plenty Of Runway
summary: Valero Energy (VLO) is a Buy: strong execution, Gulf Coast advantage, tight inventories, jet fuel demand, and cheap 8.4x P/E.

headline: Mizuho Raises Valero Energy (VLO) Price Target by $67. Here is Why
summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) is included among the 14 Best Oil and Gas Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) is the world’s premier independent petroleum refiner and a leading producer of low-carbon transportation fuels.
